title: Fantastic Roasted Malaysian Chicken Satay
description: A satvik-friendly Malaysian dish featuring roasted chicken satay with a unique blend of spices and cream of tartar, perfect for midnight cravings. This recipe yields bouncy and flavorful chicken satay.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, cream of tartar, coriander powder, cumin powder, turmeric powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken strips to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated chicken strips onto skewers, if desired.
Place the chicken skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and brush with vegetable oil.
Roast the chicken in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, prepare the satay sauce by mixing together lemon juice and 1 tablespoon of water.
Once the chicken is done, brush the satay sauce onto the chicken skewers.
Serve the roasted chicken satay hot with your favorite sides or as a snack.
